description: Composition Mustard printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar and yoke with a gold border, short hooked placket with buttons on top, short sleeves and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This elegant kurta from vishudh is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
